evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the last-touch/first-touch policy fields, but the evidence provided does not include any information or data related to these fields. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga, such as booking processes and financial validations, without addressing the specific need for last-touch/first-touch policy fields. This lack of relevant evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
